metrics.name: Fit rate
metrics.definition: The share of selected items whose width_cm and depth_cm satisfy the room or slot constraints used during grounding.
metrics.numerator: selected items passing hard dimension checks
metrics.denominator: all selected items with a required furniture slot

metrics.name: Budget accuracy
metrics.definition: The share of designs whose selected item total_price_inr is less than or equal to the user's budget_inr.
metrics.denominator: all evaluated briefs that produce a comparable output

metrics.name: Sourceability
metrics.definition: The share of selected items that map to real curated catalogue entries with stable item_id values.
metrics.numerator: selected items whose item_id exists in data/curated/abo_mvp_catalogue.csv

metrics.name: Optional Vastu compliance
metrics.definition: For briefs where vastu_enabled is true, the share of applicable deterministic Vastu rule checks that pass or warn without hard failure.
metrics.numerator: applicable Vastu checks with pass or warn status
metrics.denominator: all applicable Vastu checks for Vastu-enabled briefs
